posts.text:
Who is Trump’s stupidest cabinet member?

It's a tough call, but there’s a clear winner. robertreich.substack.com/p/t…

The Washington Post is reportedly using readers' personal data to set subscription prices.

It's a tactic known as surveillance pricing. 

Former FTC Chair Lina Khan explains.

Video

The pro-Israel, crypto, and AI lobbies have spent $21M+ to influence tomorrow's Illinois primary via innocuously-named Super PACs like "Elect Chicago Women". 

Not a single one of their ads mentions Israel, crypto, or AI.

Citizens United is corrupting our system every day.

It’s fallen out of the news cycle, but Trump’s FBI and Justice Department are still covering up major details in the Epstein files.

Video
So what does Trump do now that he’s cornered in the Strait of Hormuz? robertreich.substack.com/p/s…

The Pentagon was already one of the biggest culprits of waste, fraud, and abuse.

Now we find out Pete Hegseth has been spending our money on steak and lobster?

Video
Who’s Winning from Trump’s War on Iran? Follow the Money. robertreich.substack.com/p/s…

While we’re (rightfully) focused on Iran, there are so many other stories of corruption, criminality, and incompetence that we’re not talking about.

Remember Jeffrey Epstein? Hello?

We break down the week that was with a very special guest (and hero of mine): E. Jean Carroll. piped.video/watch?v=U7a9MnIQ…

Trump is cornered in Iran. So what will he do now? 

I'm curious to hear your thoughts. robertreich.substack.com/p/o…

Today I want to tell you about my favorite sandwich, where to get it, and some other very important information you might not have heard before.

Video

We are in an unnecessary war that the public doesn’t want, without a clear purpose or endgame. 

How should the American people respond? Some thoughts... robertreich.substack.com/p/t…

We're spending $1 billion per day on war as millions of working people struggle to get by.

Meanwhile, America's ultra-rich have never been richer.

Video

Throughout history, waging war has always been part of the authoritarian playbook.

Donald Trump’s war in Iran is the latest example. Watch.

Video

Trump announced on Friday that there will be no deal with Iran “except UNCONDITIONAL SURRENDER!”

What the hell does this mean?

What will Trump demand of Iran for its “unconditional surrender?” robertreich.substack.com/p/o…

Last year, lobbying firms raked in over $5 million from clients hoping to secure a pardon from Trump.

Turns out his pay-to-pardon scheme is quite lucrative. Watch.

Video

It's not just gas prices that are surging thanks to Trump's war.

Fertilizer costs could rise too — and send food prices skyrocketing.

Feat. @wkamaubell

Video

It’s been a hard week. If you’re feeling angry, you’re not alone. I see it in your comments. I’m struck by how you are fighting back against this tyranny, nonetheless. 

You are giving me hope.

Some thoughts... robertreich.substack.com/p/s…

Over 97% of public comments submitted to the commission reviewing Trump's ballroom oppose his White House vanity project. 

So who is this monstrosity even for? 

Billionaires and corporate donors seeking to bribe Trump for political favors. Watch.

Video

The Ellisons’ new Paramount/Warner Bros mega-media monopoly would never pass muster if America still had antitrust enforcers. 

So who can stop this? State attorneys general. Here's how. ⬇️

actionnetwork.org/letters/st…
The Epstein Cover-Up Continues
Hegseth's Lobster Dinner on Your Dime
What Does E. Jean Carroll Think of Trump and Epstein?
World War Trump (Ft. E. Jean Carroll) | The Coffee Klatch with Robert Reich
The World's BEST Sandwich
Just How Bad is Inequality in America?
Trump's Sh*tty War
The Commercial That Brought Down Kristi Noem
In With Iran, Out With Noem ft. W. Kamau Bell | The Coffee Klatch with Robert Reich
What Trump Gains From War in Iran

Who is Trump’s stupidest cabinet member?

It's a tough call, but there’s a clear winner. https://robertreich.substack.com/p/trumps-stupidest-cabinet-member

Reminder: DHS nominee Markwayne Mullin is one of the most active stock-traders in the Senate — and violated the STOCK Act against insider trading as recently as last August.

He currently holds stock in L3Harris, which has millions in contracts with ICE and FEMA.

The grift continues.

The Washington Post is reportedly using readers' personal data to set subscription prices.

It's a tactic known as surveillance pricing. 

Former FTC Chair Lina Khan explains.

Keep standing up to Trump’s ongoing attacks on the First Amendment. 

Keep pressuring media outlets and corporations to protect the free press. 

Collectively, WE have power. 

Giving in to tyranny only invites more of it.

The pro-Israel, crypto, and AI lobbies have spent $21M+ to influence tomorrow's Illinois primary via innocuously-named Super PACs like "Elect Chicago Women". 

Not a single one of their ads mentions Israel, crypto, or AI.

Citizens United is corrupting our system every day.

After working with the U.S. military in Afghanistan, Mohommad Nazeer Paktyawal died in the country he spent years of his life helping.

The cruelty is endless.

Trump's son-in-law Jared Kushner is actively meeting with Saudi officials to raise billions for his investment firm — while simultaneously serving as Middle East peace envoy.

The world pays the price of war while Trump's family reaps the riches.

JBS workers have faced unsafe working conditions, dangerous quotas, and discrimination for years.

Solidarity with these workers for fighting back and going on strike.

It’s fallen out of the news cycle, but Trump’s FBI and Justice Department are still covering up major details in the Epstein files. 

Watch: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=U7a9MnIQUWM
Never forget who is really winning this war. www.ft.com/content/37d4...

We need to end prediction markets for government action. NOW. 

This bone chilling story about a reporter’s life threatened bc he simply reported on Iran missile strikes:

“After you make us lose $900,000 we will invest no less than that to finish you.”

Trump is cornered on Iran — with no easy way out.

What is going through his brain right now? Has he fully lost his marbles?

We discussed this with one of my personal heroes and someone who took Trump on (and won): E. Jean Carroll. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=U7a9MnIQUWM
Where, may I ask, are the “First Amendment absolutists” these days? https://www.commondreams.org/news/trump-treason-charges-media
So what does Trump do now that he’s cornered in the Strait of Hormuz? https://robertreich.substack.com/p/so-what-does-trump-do-now
CONAN: “For the first time since 2012 no British people are nominated for Best actor or best Actress… a British spokesperson commented, ‘Yeah, well, at least we arrest our pedophiles.’" #Oscars

U.S. military spending is set to hit a record $1.5 trillion.

Roughly half of defense spending goes to private contractors that routinely price-gouge the government.

Meanwhile, the Pentagon has failed EIGHT straight audits.

The military industrial complex is cheering right now.

Are you watching the Oscars tonight?

I wanted to share some thoughts about one of my favorite movies (and the important lesson I learned from it): It's A Wonderful Life. 

Watch. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eQDjyZWw_A4

Remember: There is nothing natural or inevitable about extreme inequality; it’s the result of an economic system that values wealth and power over human dignity and justice.

It doesn't have to be this way.

Trump pardons allies who boost his crypto coin.

Trump invests in corporations that he's supposed to be regulating.

Trump cuts deals with autocrats to advance his family's real estate business.

The list goes on.

We must not become numb to this blatant corruption.
It’s fallen out of the news cycle, but Trump’s FBI and Justice Department are still covering up major details in the Epstein files.
The Pentagon was already one of the biggest culprits of waste, fraud, and abuse. Now we find out Pete Hegseth has been spending our money on steak and lobster?
E. Jean Carroll, one of my personal heroes, took on Trump and won. She’s one of the bravest people I’ve met. She shared some thoughts on Trump and Epstein’s awful friendship.
Today I want to tell you about my favorite sandwich, where to get it, and some other very important information you might not have heard before.
We're spending $1 billion per day on war as millions of working people struggle to get by. Meanwhile, America's ultra-rich have never been richer.
It's not just gas prices that are surging thanks to Trump's war. Fertilizer costs could rise too — and send food prices skyrocketing.
Have you seen the commercial that brought down Kristi Noem? It’s even more bizarre than I expected.

Trump and Republicans are spreading lies about SNAP in order to justify cutting the vital food assistance program. Why? So they can give bigger tax breaks to the rich and continue to boost military spending. Here’s what you should know.

Billionaire tax cuts are a policy choice. Pumping record sums into the military industrial complex is a policy choice. Launching us into another forever war is a policy choice. Doing all of this, while cutting vital food assistance programs is a policy choice.
Donald Trump once opposed war and promised to remove America from foreign entanglements. This is why he broke that promise.
